item.title: The “Goodnight Old Friend” meme comes from viral TikTok and YouTube clips featuring Franklin Clinton from Grand Theft Auto V. It’s a nostalgic and emotional meme often used to symbolize the end of a long journey, gaming session, or memorable moment, usual
